description: Emergent time and Lorentz signature: structural closure that the relational lattice produces a 3+1 Lorentzian spacetime with a derived signal speed c_Xi^2 = Z_x/Z_tau, a time-dilation formula dtau/dt = 1/sqrt(1 + alpha_K K + alpha_R R) at the local-clock level, an IR-hyperbolic dispersion omega^2(k) = c_Xi^2 |k|^2 + m_eff^2/Z_tau + O(|k|^3), and a Lorentz-violation residual Delta_Lor(k) = o(k^2). Time itself is not a separate axis but emerges as a monotone labeling of the causal partial order, with the macroscopic rate set by the inconsistency-flux ratio dot tau(x,t) = q(x,t)/Q(t). The construction is irreversible by Coleman tunnelling at 95.9% (the Gamow channel) plus four sub-dominant channels (spectral 3.0%, topological 0.5%, gravitational 0.4%, decoherence 0.3%).

lorentz_signature_closure.claim: IR-hyperbolic dispersion + Lorentz-defect = o(k^2): the lattice supports an emergent Lorentz signature in the IR
lorentz_signature_closure.structural_identity: omega(k)^2 = c_Xi^2 |k|^2 + m_eff^2 / Z_tau + O(|k|^3); c_Xi^2 = Z_x / Z_tau
lorentz_signature_closure.framing: Lorentz invariance is not postulated but proved as a low-momentum theorem (Paper 4 Theorem 7.9).

time_dilation_closure.claim: Local time-dilation formula derives gravitational redshift
time_dilation_closure.structural_identity: dtau_i / dt = 1 / sqrt(1 + alpha_K K_i + alpha_R R_i)
time_dilation_closure.interpretation: K_i is the kinetic-energy density at lattice site i; R_i is the local Ricci-curvature analog. In the weak-field limit alpha_K K + alpha_R R reduces to 2 Phi_N / c^2 with Phi_N the Newton potential, recovering the standard gravitational time dilation dtau/dt = 1/sqrt(1 + 2 Phi_N / c^2).

macroscopic_time_rate_closure.claim: Macroscopic time rate from local inconsistency flux
macroscopic_time_rate_closure.lipschitz_bound: |dot tau_i^delta - dot tau_i| <= 2 epsilon / q_min (Lipschitz-continuous in epsilon at fixed q_min)
macroscopic_time_rate_closure.monotonicity: tau_i monotonically non-decreasing along the causal partial order

irreversibility_channels.claim: Time is irreversible at 95.9% via the Gamow tunnelling channel; four sub-dominant channels make up the remaining 4.1%

channels.name: Gamow tunnelling
channels.physics: Coleman bounce action exp(-S) tunnel rate

irreversibility_channels.framing: All five channels appear in the 16-module temporal-emergence bundle of Paper 4 Section 13. The Gamow channel dominates by two orders of magnitude; the four sub-dominant channels are kept for completeness and stress-testing.

summary.framing: Time emerges as a monotone labeling of the causal partial order, with a derived Lorentz signature in the IR, a local time-dilation formula that reduces to the standard gravitational redshift in the weak-field limit, a macroscopic time-rate identity from the inconsistency flux, and an irreversibility budget dominated 96% by the Coleman bounce channel.
